• Show All Code
  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

Cite-seq analysis

NB: Code was run on the vale server https://vale.scilifelab.se/ using R v3.6.0 and Seurat v3.2.2 to stick to the original analysis.

Analysis: 1. UMAP patients, clusters and normal cell types 2. Assign AML cell types to CITe-seq RNA-seq data 3. Calculate factor score for each cell 4. Extract ADT values for downstream analysis

clean environment

```r
rm(list=ls())

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

library(Seurat)
library(ggpubr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(stringr)
library(xlsx)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(readxl)
library(data.table)

## Load markers from Dick et al paper

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuZ2VuZXNldCA8LSByZWFkLmNzdihcXC9ob21lL2Zsb3JhLm1pa2FlbG9mZi9Qcm9qZWN0cy9IYWxsbWFya3MvZGF0YS9BTUxDZWxsVHlwZV9HZW5lc2V0cy5nbXQudHh0XFwsIGhlYWRlciA9IEZBTFNFKVxuXG5ncyA8LSBsaXN0KClcbmZvciAoaSBpbiAxOm5yb3coZ2VuZXNldCkpIHtcbiAgbGluZSA8LSBnZW5lc2V0W2ksMV1cbiAgcGF0aCA8LSBnc3ViKFxcXFx0LipcXCwgXFxcXCwgbGluZSlcbiAgZ2VuZXMgPC0gZ3N1YihwYXRoLCBcXFxcLCBsaW5lKVxuICBnZW5lcyA8LSBnc3ViKFxcXFx0XFx0XFwsIFxcXFwsIGdlbmVzKVxuICBnZW5lcyA8LSBzdHJfc3BsaXQoZ2VuZXMsIFxcXFx0XFwpXG4gIGdzW1twYXRoXV0gPC0gZ2VuZXNbWzFdXVxuICBwcmludChwYXRoKVxufVxuYGBgXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
```r
geneset <- read.csv(\/home/flora.mikaeloff/Projects/Hallmarks/data/AMLCellType_Genesets.gmt.txt\, header = FALSE)

gs <- list()
for (i in 1:nrow(geneset)) {
  line <- geneset[i,1]
  path <- gsub(\\t.*\, \\, line)
  genes <- gsub(path, \\, line)
  genes <- gsub(\\t\t\, \\, genes)
  genes <- str_split(genes, \\t\)
  gs[[path]] <- genes[[1]]
  print(path)
}

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

## add Van Galen controls

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxudmFuZ2FsZW4gPC0gcmVhZC54bHN4KFxcL2hvbWUvZmxvcmEubWlrYWVsb2ZmL1Byb2plY3RzL0hhbGxtYXJrcy9kYXRhL1Zhbl9HYWxlbl9tYXJrZXJzL21tYzMueGxzeFxcLCAxKVxubm9ybWFsX0hTQyA8LSBhcy52ZWN0b3IodmFuZ2FsZW4kTm9ybWFsLmRlcml2ZWQuLmNvbWJpbmVkKVxubm9ybWFsX0dNUCA8LSBhcy52ZWN0b3IodmFuZ2FsZW4kTkEuLjEpXG5ub3JtYWxfbXllbG9pZCA8LSBhcy52ZWN0b3IodmFuZ2FsZW4kTkEuLjIpXG5gYGBcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
```r
vangalen <- read.xlsx(\/home/flora.mikaeloff/Projects/Hallmarks/data/Van_Galen_markers/mmc3.xlsx\, 1)
normal_HSC <- as.vector(vangalen$Normal.derived..combined)
normal_GMP <- as.vector(vangalen$NA..1)
normal_myeloid <- as.vector(vangalen$NA..2)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuZ3NbW1xcSFNDX1Byb2dcXF1dIDwtIG5vcm1hbF9IU0NbLWMoMSwgNTI6NTQpXVxuZ3NbW1xcR01QXFxdXSA8LSBub3JtYWxfR01QWy1jKDEsIDUyOjU0KV1cbmdzW1tcXE15ZWxvaWRcXF1dIDwtIG5vcm1hbF9teWVsb2lkWy1jKDEsIDUyOjU0KV1cblxucHJpbnQobGVuZ3RoKGdzKSlcbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
gs[[\HSC_Prog\]] <- normal_HSC[-c(1, 52:54)]
gs[[\GMP\]] <- normal_GMP[-c(1, 52:54)]
gs[[\Myeloid\]] <- normal_myeloid[-c(1, 52:54)]

print(length(gs))

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIDIwXG4ifQ== -->

[1] 20




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


## Calculate score for each cell type per cell (NB cutoff LFC = 3)

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuZm9yIChpIGluIDE6bGVuZ3RoKGdzKSkge1xuICBmZWF0dXJlcyA8LSBsaXN0KGdzW1tpXV0pXG4gIG5hbWVfY2VsbCA8LSBuYW1lcyhncylbaV1cbiAgcHJpbnQobGVuZ3RoKGZlYXR1cmVzW1sxXV1bZmVhdHVyZXNbWzFdXSAlaW4lIHJvd25hbWVzKGRhdGFAYXNzYXlzJFJOQSldKSlcbiAgZGF0YSA8LSBBZGRNb2R1bGVTY29yZShcbiAgICBvYmplY3QgPSBkYXRhLFxuICAgIGZlYXR1cmVzID0gZmVhdHVyZXMsXG4gICAgbmFtZSA9IG5hbWVfY2VsbCxcbiAgICBzZWFyY2ggPSBUUlVFKVxufVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
for (i in 1:length(gs)) {
  features <- list(gs[[i]])
  name_cell <- names(gs)[i]
  print(length(features[[1]][features[[1]] %in% rownames(data@assays$RNA)]))
  data <- AddModuleScore(
    object = data,
    features = features,
    name = name_cell,
    search = TRUE)
}
```r
print(colnames(data@meta.data)[51:70])

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

# Plot scores of cell types

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuZm9yKGkgaW4gNTE6NzApe1xuICBwcmludChjb2xuYW1lcyhkYXRhQG1ldGEuZGF0YSlbaV0pXG4gIFxuICBGZWF0dXJlUGxvdChkYXRhLFxuICAgICAgICAgICAgZmVhdHVyZXMgPSBjb2xuYW1lcyhkYXRhQG1ldGEuZGF0YSlbaV0sIGxhYmVsID0gRkFMU0UsIHJlcGVsID0gVFJVRSkgK1xuICAgICAgICAgICAgc2NhbGVfY29sb3VyX2dyYWRpZW50bihjb2xvdXJzID0gcmV2KGJyZXdlci5wYWwobiA9IDExLCBuYW1lID0gXFxSZEJ1XFwpKSkrIGdncGxvdDI6OnRoZW1lKGxlZ2VuZC5wb3NpdGlvbiA9IFxcbm9uZVxcKVxuICBcbiAgZ2dzYXZlKHBhc3RlMChcXHJlc3VsdHMvZmlndXJlcy9zY29yZV9wbG90X1xcLCBjb2xuYW1lcyhkYXRhQG1ldGEuZGF0YSlbaV0sXFwucGRmXFwpLCB3aWR0aCA9IDQsIGhlaWdodCA9IDQpXG4gIGdnc2F2ZShwYXN0ZTAoXFxyZXN1bHRzL2ZpZ3VyZXMvc2NvcmVfcGxvdF9cXCwgY29sbmFtZXMoZGF0YUBtZXRhLmRhdGEpW2ldLFxcLnBuZ1xcKSwgd2lkdGggPSA0LCBoZWlnaHQgPSA0KVxufVxuYGBgXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
```r
for(i in 51:70){
  print(colnames(data@meta.data)[i])
  
  FeaturePlot(data,
            features = colnames(data@meta.data)[i], label = FALSE, repel = TRUE) +
            scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = \RdBu\)))+ ggplot2::theme(legend.position = \none\)
  
  ggsave(paste0(\results/figures/score_plot_\, colnames(data@meta.data)[i],\.pdf\), width = 4, height = 4)
  ggsave(paste0(\results/figures/score_plot_\, colnames(data@meta.data)[i],\.png\), width = 4, height = 4)
}

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


## remove control cells HL60

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxua2VlcCA8LSByb3duYW1lcyhkYXRhQG1ldGEuZGF0YSlbIWdyZXBsKFxcSEw2MFxcLCBkYXRhQG1ldGEuZGF0YSRQYXRpZW50TGV2ZWwpXVxuZGF0YSA8LSBzdWJzZXQoZGF0YSwgY2VsbHMgPSBrZWVwKVxuYGBgXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
```r
keep <- rownames(data@meta.data)[!grepl(\HL60\, data@meta.data$PatientLevel)]
data <- subset(data, cells = keep)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuIyBQcm9qZWN0aW5nIHNpbmdsZXQgaWRlbnRpdGllcyBvbiBUU05FIHZpc3VhbGl6YXRpb25cbkRpbVBsb3QoZGF0YSwgcmVkdWN0aW9uID0gXFx1bWFwXFwsIGdyb3VwLmJ5ID0gXFxXZWxsXFwpKyBnZ3Bsb3QyOjp0aGVtZShsZWdlbmQucG9zaXRpb24gPSBcXG5vbmVcXClcbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
# Projecting singlet identities on TSNE visualization
DimPlot(data, reduction = \umap\, group.by = \Well\)+ ggplot2::theme(legend.position = \none\)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

```r
```r
col_cells <- c(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(6,'Set1'), \#d2d5d9\)

DimPlot(data, reduction = \umap\, group.by = \PatientLevel\, cols = col_cells) + ggplot2::theme(legend.position = \none\)
ggsave(paste0(\results/figures/score_plot_Tojo_patients.pdf\), width = 4, height = 4)
ggsave(paste0(\results/figures/score_plot_Tojo_patients.png\), width = 4, height = 4)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

ggsave(paste0(\results/figures/score_plot_Tojo_cell_types.png\), width = 4, height = 4)

```r
```r
DimPlot(data, reduction = \umap\, group.by = \seurat_clusters\) + ggplot2::theme(legend.position = \none\)
ggsave(paste0(\results/figures/score_plot_Tojo_clusters.pdf\), width = 4, height = 4)
ggsave(paste0(\results/figures/score_plot_Tojo_clusters.png\), width = 4, height = 4)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

## Assign cells --> extract top 3 scores / only LFC > 3 / score 1 > 0.5 compared to score 2

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->

```r
```r
cell_scores <- data@meta.data[,51:70]
cell_scores$score_1 <- NA
cell_scores$score_2 <- NA
cell_scores$score_3 <- NA

cell_scores$cell_1 <- NA
cell_scores$cell_2 <- NA
cell_scores$cell_3 <- NA


topMaxUsingFullSort <- function(x, N) {
  sort(x, decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(N, length(x))]
}


for (i in 1:nrow(cell_scores)) {
  #print(i)
  top_3 <- topMaxUsingFullSort(cell_scores[i, 1:20], 3)
  cell_scores[i, 21] <- top_3[[1]]
  cell_scores[i, 22] <- top_3[[2]]
  cell_scores[i, 23] <- top_3[[3]]
  
  cell_scores[i, 24] <- colnames(top_3)[1]
  cell_scores[i, 25] <- colnames(top_3)[2]
  cell_scores[i, 26] <- colnames(top_3)[3]
}

write.csv(cell_scores, \results/scores_cells_Dick_top_3_assigned_cells.csv\)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuY2VsbF9zY29yZXMgPC0gcmVhZC5jc3YoXFxyZXN1bHRzL3Njb3Jlc19jZWxsc19EaWNrX3RvcF8zX2Fzc2lnbmVkX2NlbGxzLmNzdlxcLCByb3cubmFtZXMgPSAxKVxuY2VsbF9zY29yZXMgPC0gY2VsbF9zY29yZXNbLGMoMjE6MjYpXVxud3JpdGUuY3N2KGNlbGxfc2NvcmVzLCBcXHJlc3VsdHMvc2NvcmVzX2NlbGxzX0RpY2tfdG9wXzNfYXNzaWduZWRfY2VsbHNfc2NvcmVzX29ubHkuY3N2XFwpXG5gYGBcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
```r
cell_scores <- read.csv(\results/scores_cells_Dick_top_3_assigned_cells.csv\, row.names = 1)
cell_scores <- cell_scores[,c(21:26)]
write.csv(cell_scores, \results/scores_cells_Dick_top_3_assigned_cells_scores_only.csv\)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-text-end -->

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuY2VsbF9zY29yZXMgPC0gcmVhZC5jc3YoXFxyZXN1bHRzL3Njb3Jlc19jZWxsc19EaWNrX3RvcF8zX2Fzc2lnbmVkX2NlbGxzX3Njb3Jlc19vbmx5LmNzdlxcLCByb3cubmFtZXMgPSAxKVxuXG5jZWxsX3Njb3JlcyRtYXRjaCA8LSBOQVxuY2VsbF9zY29yZXMkbWF0Y2hbY2VsbF9zY29yZXMkc2NvcmVfMSA+IDJdIDwtIFxcb2tcXFxudGFibGUoY2VsbF9zY29yZXMkbWF0Y2gpXG5gYGBcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
```r
cell_scores <- read.csv(\results/scores_cells_Dick_top_3_assigned_cells_scores_only.csv\, row.names = 1)

cell_scores$match <- NA
cell_scores$match[cell_scores$score_1 > 2] <- \ok\
table(cell_scores$match)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG4gIG9rIFxuMjM0NSBcbiJ9 -->

ok 2345




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuY2VsbF9zY29yZXMkcmVnZXhfMSA8LSBjZWxsX3Njb3JlcyRjZWxsXzFcbmNlbGxfc2NvcmVzJHJlZ2V4XzEgPC0gZ3N1YihcXFxcXFwuLipcXCwgXFxcXCwgY2VsbF9zY29yZXMkcmVnZXhfMSlcblxuY2VsbF9zY29yZXMkcmVnZXhfMiA8LSBjZWxsX3Njb3JlcyRjZWxsXzJcbmNlbGxfc2NvcmVzJHJlZ2V4XzIgPC0gZ3N1YihcXFxcXFwuLipcXCwgXFxcXCwgY2VsbF9zY29yZXMkcmVnZXhfMilcblxuY2VsbF9zY29yZXMkbWF0Y2hbY2VsbF9zY29yZXMkcmVnZXhfMSA9PSBjZWxsX3Njb3JlcyRyZWdleF8yICYgY2VsbF9zY29yZXMkc2NvcmVfMSA+IDNdIDwtIFxcZGJcXFxuXG5jZWxsX3Njb3JlcyRzY29yZV8yW2NlbGxfc2NvcmVzJG1hdGNoID09IFxcZGJcXCAmICFpcy5uYShjZWxsX3Njb3JlcyRtYXRjaCldIDwtIGNlbGxfc2NvcmVzJHNjb3JlXzNbY2VsbF9zY29yZXMkbWF0Y2ggPT0gXFxkYlxcICYgIWlzLm5hKGNlbGxfc2NvcmVzJG1hdGNoKV1cblxuY2VsbF9zY29yZXMkZGlmZiA8LSBjZWxsX3Njb3JlcyRzY29yZV8xIC0gY2VsbF9zY29yZXMkc2NvcmVfMlxuXG5jZWxsX3Njb3JlcyRtYXRjaFtjZWxsX3Njb3JlcyRkaWZmIDwgMC41XSA8LSBcXG1peFxcXG5jZWxsX3Njb3JlcyRtYXRjaFtjZWxsX3Njb3JlcyRkaWZmID4gMC41ICYgIGNlbGxfc2NvcmVzJHNjb3JlXzEgPiAzXSA8LSBcXG9rXFxcbnRhYmxlKGNlbGxfc2NvcmVzJG1hdGNoKVxuYGBgXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
```r
cell_scores$regex_1 <- cell_scores$cell_1
cell_scores$regex_1 <- gsub(\\\..*\, \\, cell_scores$regex_1)

cell_scores$regex_2 <- cell_scores$cell_2
cell_scores$regex_2 <- gsub(\\\..*\, \\, cell_scores$regex_2)

cell_scores$match[cell_scores$regex_1 == cell_scores$regex_2 & cell_scores$score_1 > 3] <- \db\

cell_scores$score_2[cell_scores$match == \db\ & !is.na(cell_scores$match)] <- cell_scores$score_3[cell_scores$match == \db\ & !is.na(cell_scores$match)]

cell_scores$diff <- cell_scores$score_1 - cell_scores$score_2

cell_scores$match[cell_scores$diff < 0.5] <- \mix\
cell_scores$match[cell_scores$diff > 0.5 &  cell_scores$score_1 > 3] <- \ok\
table(cell_scores$match)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG4gIG1peCAgICBvayBcbjE0NDk0ICAxMzgxIFxuIn0= -->

mix ok 14494 1381




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuY2VsbF9zY29yZXMkY2VsbF8xW2NlbGxfc2NvcmVzJG1hdGNoICE9IFxcb2tcXF0gPC0gTkFcblxuY2VsbF9zY29yZXMkY2VsbF8xW2NlbGxfc2NvcmVzJHNjb3JlXzEgPCAyXSA8LSBOQVxuXG5jZWxsX3Njb3JlcyRjZWxsXzEgPC0gZ3N1YihcXFxcXFwuVG9wLipcXCwgXFxcXCwgY2VsbF9zY29yZXMkY2VsbF8xKVxuXG50YWJsZShjZWxsX3Njb3JlcyRtYXRjaClcbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
cell_scores$cell_1[cell_scores$match != \ok\] <- NA

cell_scores$cell_1[cell_scores$score_1 < 2] <- NA

cell_scores$cell_1 <- gsub(\\\.Top.*\, \\, cell_scores$cell_1)

table(cell_scores$match)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

```r
```r
data@meta.data$cell_1[data@meta.data$cell_1 == \Myeloid\ & !is.na(data@meta.data$cell_1) ] <- paste0(\Ctrl.\, data@meta.data$cell_1[data@meta.data$cell_1 == \Myeloid\ & !is.na(data@meta.data$cell_1) ] )

data@meta.data$cell_1[data@meta.data$cell_1 == \GMP\ & !is.na(data@meta.data$cell_1) ] <- paste0(\Ctrl.\, data@meta.data$cell_1[data@meta.data$cell_1 == \GMP\ & !is.na(data@meta.data$cell_1) ] )

data@meta.data$cell_1[data@meta.data$cell_1 == \HSC_Prog\ & !is.na(data@meta.data$cell_1) ] <- paste0(\Ctrl.\, data@meta.data$cell_1[data@meta.data$cell_1 == \HSC_Prog\ & !is.na(data@meta.data$cell_1) ] )

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

```r
```r
#' Perform survival analysis for each MOFA factor
#'
#' @param file variable containing file
#' @param name name of the file
#' @param destination destination folder for file
scores_factor <- function(fname, txn, genes){
  myFactor1=RNAfac[RNAfac$factor==fname,]
  p1=c(1:nrow(myFactor1)) # for coefficients
  
  if(genes == \genes\){
    myFactor1$feature <- myFactor1$label
  }
  
  pick=txn$stable_id %in% myFactor1$feature[p1]
  #print(pick)
  mygex1=txn[pick,drop=FALSE,]
  rownames(mygex1) <- mygex1$stable_id
  mygex1=data.frame(t(mygex1[,colnames(mygex1) != \stable_id\]))
  x=as.matrix(mygex1)
  #print(dim(x))
  
  beta=myFactor1$value[match(colnames(x),myFactor1$feature)]
  beta[is.na(beta)] <- 0
  yval=t(t(x) * beta)
  yval=rowSums(yval)
  
  weight <- data.frame(yval)
  colnames(weight) <- fname
  weight$patient_id <- rownames(weight)
  
  yval <- data.frame(patient_id = names(yval), score = yval)
  yval$group <- as.integer(yval$score > median(yval$score))+1
  return(yval)
}

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->

gex$stable_id <- rownames(gex)

### import factors data

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuUk5BX2ZhY3RvcnM9TlVMTFxuZm9yIChpIGluIDE6MTEpe1xuICBmYWN0b3JOYW1lPXBhc3RlMChcXEZhY3RvclxcLGksXFxfUk5Bc2VxXFwpXG4gIGNhdChmYWN0b3JOYW1lLFxcIFxcKVxuICBkYXQ9cmVhZF9leGNlbChwYXRoX2ZhY3RvcnMsc2hlZXQ9ZmFjdG9yTmFtZSlcbiAgZGF0PWRhdGEudGFibGUoZGF0KVxuICBwcmludChucm93KGRhdCkpXG4gIFJOQV9mYWN0b3JzW1tpXV09ZGF0XG59XG5gYGBcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
```r
RNA_factors=NULL
for (i in 1:11){
  factorName=paste0(\Factor\,i,\_RNAseq\)
  cat(factorName,\ \)
  dat=read_excel(path_factors,sheet=factorName)
  dat=data.table(dat)
  print(nrow(dat))
  RNA_factors[[i]]=dat
}

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

```r
```r
RNAfac=do.call(rbind,RNA_factors)
RNAfac$feature=gsub(\.g\,\\,RNAfac$feature)

## set thresholds for each factor
factorNames=unique(RNAfac$factor)
topGeneThres=c(9,10,2,6,4,1,2,3,3,6,3)
names(topGeneThres)=factorNames

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxudGFibGVfc2NvcmVzIDwtIGRhdGEuZnJhbWUocGF0aWVudF9pZCA9IGNvbG5hbWVzKGdleCkpXG5cbmZvciAoZmFjdG9yIGluIGZhY3Rvck5hbWVzKXtcbiAgcHJpbnQoZmFjdG9yKVxuICBzY29yZXNfRiA8LSBzY29yZXNfZmFjdG9yKGZhY3RvciwgZ2V4LCBcXGdlbmVzXFwpXG4gIHRhYmxlX3Njb3JlcyA8LSBtZXJnZSh0YWJsZV9zY29yZXMsIHNjb3Jlc19GLCBieSA9IFxccGF0aWVudF9pZFxcKVxufVxuYGBgXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
```r
table_scores <- data.frame(patient_id = colnames(gex))

for (factor in factorNames){
  print(factor)
  scores_F <- scores_factor(factor, gex, \genes\)
  table_scores <- merge(table_scores, scores_F, by = \patient_id\)
}

# Plot scores

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuZm9yKGkgaW4gc2VxKDczLDkzLCAyKSl7XG4gIHByaW50KGNvbG5hbWVzKGRhdGFAbWV0YS5kYXRhKVtpXSlcbiAgRmVhdHVyZVBsb3QoZGF0YSxcbiAgICAgICAgICAgIGZlYXR1cmVzID0gY29sbmFtZXMoZGF0YUBtZXRhLmRhdGEpW2ldLCBsYWJlbCA9IEZBTFNFLCByZXBlbCA9IFRSVUUpICtcbiAgICAgICAgICAgIHNjYWxlX2NvbG91cl9ncmFkaWVudG4oY29sb3VycyA9IHJldihicmV3ZXIucGFsKG4gPSAxMSwgbmFtZSA9IFxcUmRCdVxcKSkpKyBnZ3Bsb3QyOjp0aGVtZShsZWdlbmQucG9zaXRpb24gPSBcXG5vbmVcXClcbiAgXG4gIGdnc2F2ZShwYXN0ZTAoXFxyZXN1bHRzL2ZpZ3VyZXMvc2NvcmVfcGxvdF9cXCwgY29sbmFtZXMoZGF0YUBtZXRhLmRhdGEpW2ldLFxcX3Njb3Jlc19NT0ZBLnBkZlxcKSwgd2lkdGggPSA0LCBoZWlnaHQgPSA0KVxuICBnZ3NhdmUocGFzdGUwKFxccmVzdWx0cy9maWd1cmVzL3Njb3JlX3Bsb3RfXFwsIGNvbG5hbWVzKGRhdGFAbWV0YS5kYXRhKVtpXSxcXF9zY29yZXNfTU9GQS5wbmdcXCksIHdpZHRoID0gNCwgaGVpZ2h0ID0gNClcbn1cbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
for(i in seq(73,93, 2)){
  print(colnames(data@meta.data)[i])
  FeaturePlot(data,
            features = colnames(data@meta.data)[i], label = FALSE, repel = TRUE) +
            scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = \RdBu\)))+ ggplot2::theme(legend.position = \none\)
  
  ggsave(paste0(\results/figures/score_plot_\, colnames(data@meta.data)[i],\_scores_MOFA.pdf\), width = 4, height = 4)
  ggsave(paste0(\results/figures/score_plot_\, colnames(data@meta.data)[i],\_scores_MOFA.png\), width = 4, height = 4)
}

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFxcRmFjdG9yXzFfc2NvcmVcXFxuU2NhbGUgZm9yICdjb2xvdXInIGlzIGFscmVhZHkgcHJlc2VudC4gQWRkaW5nIGFub3RoZXIgc2NhbGUgZm9yICdjb2xvdXInLCB3aGljaCB3aWxsIHJlcGxhY2UgdGhlIGV4aXN0aW5nIHNjYWxlLlxuWzFdIFxcRmFjdG9yXzJfc2NvcmVcXFxuWzFdIFxcRmFjdG9yXzNfc2NvcmVcXFxuWzFdIFxcRmFjdG9yXzRfc2NvcmVcXFxuWzFdIFxcRmFjdG9yXzVfc2NvcmVcXFxuWzFdIFxcRmFjdG9yXzZfc2NvcmVcXFxuWzFdIFxcRmFjdG9yXzdfc2NvcmVcXFxuWzFdIFxcRmFjdG9yXzhfc2NvcmVcXFxuWzFdIFxcRmFjdG9yXzlfc2NvcmVcXFxuWzFdIFxcRmFjdG9yXzEwX3Njb3JlXFxcblsxXSBcXEZhY3Rvcl8xMV9zY29yZVxcXG4ifQ== -->

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuY2VsbHMgPC0gZGF0YUBtZXRhLmRhdGFbIWlzLm5hKGRhdGFAbWV0YS5kYXRhJGNlbGxfMSksIF1cbmNlbGxzJGNlbGxfMSA8LSBhcy52ZWN0b3IoY2VsbHMkY2VsbF8xKVxueCA8LSB0YWJsZShjZWxscyRjZWxsXzEpID4gNTBcbnggPC0gbmFtZXMoeClbeCA9PSBUUlVFXVxuYGBgXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
```r
cells <- data@meta.data[!is.na(data@meta.data$cell_1), ]
cells$cell_1 <- as.vector(cells$cell_1)
x <- table(cells$cell_1) > 50
x <- names(x)[x == TRUE]

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuY2VsbHMgPC0gZGF0YUBtZXRhLmRhdGFbZGF0YUBtZXRhLmRhdGEkY2VsbF8xICVpbiUgeCwgXVxuY2VsbHMkY2VsbF8xIDwtIGFzLnZlY3RvcihjZWxscyRjZWxsXzEpXG50YWJsZShjZWxscyRjZWxsXzEpXG5gYGBcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
```r
cells <- data@meta.data[data@meta.data$cell_1 %in% x, ]
cells$cell_1 <- as.vector(cells$cell_1)
table(cells$cell_1)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG4gICAgICBjREMubGlrZSAgIEN0cmwuTXllbG9pZCAgICAgICBHTVAubGlrZSAgICAgTFNQQy5DeWNsZSBMU1BDLlF1aWVzY2VudCAgICAgVW5hc3NpZ25lZCBcbiAgICAgICAgICAgMjI0ICAgICAgICAgICAgIDk5ICAgICAgICAgICAgNTgyICAgICAgICAgICAgMTYyICAgICAgICAgICAgMTg1ICAgICAgICAgIDE2MDg3IFxuIn0= -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxubXlfY29tcGFyaXNvbnMgPC0gbGlzdChjKFxcTFNQQy5DeWNsZVxcLCBcXExTUEMuUXVpZXNjZW50XFwpLCBjKFxcY0RDLmxpa2VcXCwgXFxHTVAubGlrZS5cXCksIGMoXFxjREMubGlrZVxcLCBcXExTUEMuUXVpZXNjZW50XFwpLCBjKFxcR01QLmxpa2VcXCwgXFxMU1BDLkN5Y2xlXFwpLCBjKFxcR01QLmxpa2VcXCwgXFxMU1BDLlF1aWVzY2VudFxcKSwgYyhcXGNEQy5saWtlXFwsIFxcTFNQQy5DeWNsZVxcKSlcblxuZm9yIChpIGluIHNlcSg3Myw5MywgMikpIHtcbiAgcHJpbnQoY29sbmFtZXMoY2VsbHMpW2ldKVxuICBnZyA8LSBnZ3Bsb3QoY2VsbHMsIGFlcyh5PWNlbGxzWyxpXSwgeD1jZWxsXzEsIGZpbGwgPSBjZWxsXzEpKSArIFxuICBnZW9tX2JveHBsb3QoKSt0aGVtZShsZWdlbmQucG9zaXRpb24gPSBcXG5vbmVcXCkrIFxuICBzdGF0X2NvbXBhcmVfbWVhbnMoY29tcGFyaXNvbnMgPSBteV9jb21wYXJpc29ucykrdGhlbWVfY2xhc3NpYygpKyB0aGVtZShheGlzLnRleHQueCA9IGVsZW1lbnRfdGV4dChhbmdsZSA9IDkwLCB2anVzdCA9IDAuNSwgaGp1c3Q9MSkpXG5nZ3NhdmUocGFzdGUwKFxccmVzdWx0cy9maWd1cmVzL2JveHBsb3RzX2NlbGxfdHlwZXNfXFwsIGNvbG5hbWVzKGNlbGxzKVtpXSxcXC5wZGZcXCksIGhlaWdodCA9IDYsIHdpZHRoID0gOClcbmdnc2F2ZShwYXN0ZTAoXFxyZXN1bHRzL2ZpZ3VyZXMvYm94cGxvdHNfY2VsbF90eXBlc19cXCwgY29sbmFtZXMoY2VsbHMpW2ldLFxcLnBuZ1xcKSwgaGVpZ2h0ID0gNiwgd2lkdGggPSA4KVxuZ2dcbn1cbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
my_comparisons <- list(c(\LSPC.Cycle\, \LSPC.Quiescent\), c(\cDC.like\, \GMP.like.\), c(\cDC.like\, \LSPC.Quiescent\), c(\GMP.like\, \LSPC.Cycle\), c(\GMP.like\, \LSPC.Quiescent\), c(\cDC.like\, \LSPC.Cycle\))

for (i in seq(73,93, 2)) {
  print(colnames(cells)[i])
  gg <- ggplot(cells, aes(y=cells[,i], x=cell_1, fill = cell_1)) + 
  geom_boxplot()+theme(legend.position = \none\)+ 
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons)+theme_classic()+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))
ggsave(paste0(\results/figures/boxplots_cell_types_\, colnames(cells)[i],\.pdf\), height = 6, width = 8)
ggsave(paste0(\results/figures/boxplots_cell_types_\, colnames(cells)[i],\.png\), height = 6, width = 8)
gg
}

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

```r
```r
cells <- cells[cells$cell_1 != \Unassigned\,]
colnames(cells)[seq(73,93, 2)] <- gsub(\Factor_\, \DDHM\, colnames(cells)[seq(73,93, 2)])
colnames(cells)[seq(73,93, 2)] <- gsub(\_score\, \\, colnames(cells)[seq(73,93, 2)])

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->

```r
cells[,seq(73,93, 2)] <- scale(cells[,seq(73,93, 2)] )

<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuY29sdW1uX2hhIDwtIEhlYXRtYXBBbm5vdGF0aW9uKGNlbGxfdHlwZSA9IGNlbGxzJGNlbGxfMSlcblxucGRmKFxccmVzdWx0cy9maWd1cmVzL2hlYXRtYXBfZmFjdG9yc19zY2FsZWRfY2VsbF90eXBlc19jbHVzdGVyaW5nLnBkZlxcKVxuSGVhdG1hcCh0KGNlbGxzWyxzZXEoNzMsOTMsIDIpXSksIHNob3dfcm93X25hbWVzID0gVFJVRSwgc2hvd19jb2x1bW5fbmFtZXMgPSBGQUxTRSwgcm93X3RpdGxlX3JvdCA9IDAsIHRvcF9hbm5vdGF0aW9uID0gY29sdW1uX2hhKVxuZGV2Lm9mZigpXG5gYGBcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
```r
column_ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(cell_type = cells$cell_1)

pdf(\results/figures/heatmap_factors_scaled_cell_types_clustering.pdf\)
Heatmap(t(cells[,seq(73,93, 2)]), show_row_names = TRUE, show_column_names = FALSE, row_title_rot = 0, top_annotation = column_ha)
dev.off()
